description.en-US: Milesight TS602 — LoRaWAN (Class A) sensor that monitors temperature. Uplinks are channel-TLV frames on FPort 85. (Datasheet/user guide cover the TS60X series.)
description.pt-BR: Milesight TS602 — sensor LoRaWAN (Classe A) que monitora temperatura. Os uplinks são quadros channel-TLV no FPort 85. (Datasheet/manual cobrem a série TS60X.)
